3F8.name: RCCM_THCHvacDuctSensors2
3F8.comment: Community DBC mislabels as DCDC_alertMatrix1 (boolean fault bits); the captured bus actually carries cabin-HVAC duct temps. Definition verified against Amond/SMT PT.dbc (BO_ 1016, NOT redistributed) and confirmed by byte-variance probe of the 2026-06-21 capture (4x u16 LE, ~20-50 C). See Task 4 boundary gate before public commit.

212.comment: BCFRONT_lightStatus: wire is 5B not 8B (all 3912 frames in 2026-06-21 capture). DBC 8B light enums decode unreliable (byte3=FF -> spurious FAULT). Suppress from faults until characterized.

232.comment: BCREAR_lightStatus: wire is 4B not 8B (all 3905 frames). Same issue as 0x212.
